title: 无标题文章
summary: Lots of "I built this with AI" posts lately. Here's one where I actually enjoyed the building part. Introducing PodSync (for editors): a podcast alignment tool (uses VAD, MFCC fingerprinting, x-correlation). AI helped me 👨‍💻 it in Rust but yrs of aligning tracks 👂helped with the algo! Wrote up the full approach with an interactive demo: - https:// kau.sh/bl…
